claim_bullets.bullet_text: JavaScript does not permit us to rebind a name that has been bound with const. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.148-150)
JavaScript permits reassigning values to parameters. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.148-150)
The let keyword allows reassignment of variables. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.148-150)

source_record_text: JavaScript allows re-assignment of values to parameters, but not to names bound with const. The let keyword provides a way to declare variables that can be reassigned.
